L2.description: A command injection vulnerability exists where attacker-controlled destination values from network monitoring configurations are directly interpolated into shell command strings and passed to a shell-spawning execution function without any sanitization or validation, allowing authenticated users to inject arbitrary operating system commands via shell metacharacters.

L3.description: A command injection vulnerability exists where attacker-controlled destination values from network monitoring configurations are directly interpolated into shell command strings and passed to a shell-spawning execution function without any sanitization or validation, allowing authenticated users to inject arbitrary operating system commands via shell metacharacters.

ground_truth.reason: The performTraceroute method directly interpolates user-controlled destination strings into shell commands executed via child_process.exec(), allowing OS command injection through shell metacharacters.
